events.name: equipment_failure
events.description: The primary water recycler fails catastrophically.

events.name: resource_strike
events.description: Ice deposits discovered beneath the eastern ridge.

events.name: cave_discovery
events.description: Lava tube entrance found — potential expansion space.

meta_awareness.insight: Rust Vega whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'

memories.event: Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.

Accusations of resource hoarding fracture the colony trust.

Double shadow: Phobos and Deimos transit simultaneously.
Fine Martian regolith clogs air filters and reduces solar output.
